calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove-Up Against Brand Mar, Inc. And Brandon G. Webster
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Dana Andreoli, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, HK GRACE BUILDING LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) BRND MAR, INC., a California Corporation, and BRANDON G. WEBSTER, an indivicual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Stephen Brett sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $247,554.75
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,680.13
Attorney's Fees: $3,750.00
Costs: $949.70
Total Judgment in the amount of $255,934.58
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Continued To Feb-26-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
